summary: The diff implements the majority of the four requirements. REQ-42 (removing G.AI Chat button/panel from UI) is partially implemented — AIChatButton.tsx and AIChatPanel.tsx are listed as modified but their file summaries still describe original functionality. REQ-43 (30 new admin commands) is largely implemented via useFunCommands.ts and AdminPanel.tsx. REQ-44 (ChatArea/ChatPage fun state rendering) is implemented. REQ-45 (removing broken command references) is implemented. Several specific details appear missing or unverifiable due to diff truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Delete or disable AIChatButton.tsx and AIChatPanel.tsx — no floating G.AI Chat button visible anywhere
missing_requirements.reason: AIChatButton.tsx and AIChatPanel.tsx appear in the modified list, and their file summaries still describe their original functionality (floating button, private panel). The files were not deleted. The requirement says to delete or disable them.

missing_requirements.requirement: Neon Theme, Retro Theme, and Reset Theme must apply CSS theme classes to the root layout element based on globalchat_theme state
missing_requirements.reason: While tailwind.config.js defines neon/retro color tokens, there is no evidence in the diff of CSS theme classes being applied to a root layout element based on globalchat_theme changes. ChatPage.tsx does not show theme class toggling on a root element.

missing_requirements.requirement: Neon/Retro/Reset Theme — apply the correct CSS theme class to the root layout when globalchat_theme changes
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence in ChatPage.tsx or any layout component of reading globalchat_theme from localStorage/BroadcastChannel and applying a theme CSS class to the root or body element at runtime.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove ShutdownOverlay.tsx, StartupOverlay.tsx, and OwnerShutdownBanner.tsx components and all their imports
missing_requirements.reason: These components are not listed as removed files in the diff. ChatPage.tsx does not import them but the files may still exist in the project.

hallucinated_features.description: Force text admin command with forceTarget and forceText inputs in AdminPanel
hallucinated_features.reason: AdminPanel.tsx shows state variables forceTarget, forceText, and forceStatus implementing a send-as-user or force-text command. This was not listed among the 30 required admin commands in REQ-43.
